g) → > Result: PASS

product/features/crt-030/reports/gate-3b-report.md

entries.title: Gate 3c: always grep non-negotiable test names before accepting RISK-COVERAGE-REPORT PASS claims
AC-22-style CI grep gates must exclude test code — domain strings in test helpers cause false failures
Read clippy output directly — avoid multi-pipe shell chains that produce output_parsing_struggle
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
